name: GOLFTEC Walnut Creek
address: 1651 Botelho Dr Suite 100, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
about: GOLFTEC Walnut Creek provides indoor golf instruction and practice utilizing advanced technology. The facility offers data-driven golf lessons using systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Sessions are led by PGA-certified coaches who create personalized improvement plans. The venue is structured for focused skill development, with training bays equipped for both instruction and independent practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis with OPTIMOTION motion capture technology
Data-driven coaching using launch monitors and video feedback
Personalized improvement plans developed by PGA-certified coaches
Practice memberships provide access to bays with simulator technology

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for club fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are available at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time for 18 holes varies depending on the software used and number of players.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers instruction programs for juniors and youth golfers.
